motto: A new internet from each home — free VMs as sovereign field nodes

providers.name: Oracle Cloud Always Free
providers.notes: 4 OCPU ARM + 24GB RAM free forever; open SSH 22 from your IP only

providers.name: Google Cloud e2-micro
providers.notes: Always-free tier in select regions; f1-micro legacy

providers.name: AWS EC2 t2/t3.micro
providers.notes: 12 months free for new accounts; use t3.micro

providers.name: Azure B1s
providers.notes: 12 months free; loopback stack fits B1s with swap

providers.name: Fly.io
providers.notes: Needs Dockerfile adaptation — use SSH VM providers for full stack today

providers.name: Cloudflare Tunnel (Zero Trust)
providers.notes: Propagates loopback Grok Lab perimeter through CF edge — no inbound ports. Token in GrokLab/deploy/cloudflare/tunnel.token
